title: Aharji
tagline: Aharji — spiritual town of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Aharji is a historical pilgrimage site for Jainism in India.
overview.description: Aharji is a historical pilgrimage site for Jainism in India. It is located in the central Indian state of Madhya Pradesh, on the road from Tikamgarh to Chhatarpur. This place is famous for Jain Temple.

topPlaces.name: Baldeogarh
topPlaces.description: Baldeogarh is a town and a nagar panchayat in Tikamgarh district in the state of Madhya Pradesh, India. It is also a Tehsil Headquarter.

topPlaces.name: Garrauli State
topPlaces.description: Garrouli; Hindi Name गर्रौली) is a fort and former princely state in present Madhya Pradesh, central India.

topPlaces.name: Khargapur
topPlaces.description: Khargapur is a town and a nagar panchayat in Tikamgarh district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. Khargapur is an assembly constituency.

items.note: Baldeogarh is a town and a nagar panchayat in Tikamgarh district in the state of Madhya Pradesh, India. It is also a Tehsil Headquarter.
Garrouli; Hindi Name गर्रौली) is a fort and former princely state in present Madhya Pradesh, central India.
Khargapur is a town and a nagar panchayat in Tikamgarh district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. Khargapur is an assembly constituency.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Aharji?
faq.a: The best time to visit Aharji is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

The nearest airport is Gwalior Airport (194 km) and the nearest railway station is Jhansi Junction (97 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Aharji?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Aharji at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Aharji?
faq.a: Stays in Aharji start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Aharji?
faq.a: The top attractions are Baldeogarh, Garrauli State, Khargapur.
